nasb.text: He has remembered His lovingkindness and His faithfulness to the house of Israel; All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

esv.text: He has remembered his steadfast love and faithfulness to the house of Israel. All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

cnv.text: 他記念他向以色列家所應許的慈愛和信實， 地的四極都看見我們　神的救恩。

ccb.text: 祂没有忘记以慈爱和信实对待以色列人， 普天下都看见我们的上帝拯救了我们。

csbs.text: 他记念他对以色列家的慈爱和信实， 所有的地极都看见我们神的救恩。
